pathway_summary: A C. elegans inter-organ signaling pathway in which a serotonergic/octopaminergic neuronal relay (ADF, AWB, URX, RIC) senses and transmits signals that culminate in an endocrine signal from URX to the intestine, where nhr-76 activates the lipase ATGL to drive beta-oxidation and fat loss. The model spans neuronal neurotransmitter signaling (5-HT, octopamine) and intestinal transcriptional regulation of lipolysis; it excludes the reporter/quantification panels (A–D), which are experimental evidence rather than pathway components.

genes.note: Tryptophan hydroxylase in ADF neurons; rate-limiting enzyme for serotonin (5-HT) biosynthesis.
Octopamine GPCR in AWB neurons; receives octopamine from RIC and acts upstream of ADF/tph-1.
Serotonin-gated chloride channel in URX neurons; receives 5-HT and feeds the endocrine signal to the intestine.
Tyramine beta-hydroxylase in RIC neurons; enzyme for octopamine biosynthesis.
Intestinal nuclear hormone receptor / transcription factor that activates ATGL expression.
Adipose triglyceride lipase in intestine; hydrolyzes triglycerides, driving beta-oxidation and fat loss.

molecules.label: 5-HT
molecules.directness_note: Serotonin is produced by tph-1 (ADF) and directly binds/gates the MOD-1 serotonin-gated channel in URX — a direct receptor ligand (RO:0012001). Also a producer->consumer relay: output of tph-1, input/activator of mod-1.

molecules.label: 5-HT
molecules.directness_note: Serotonin is the enzymatic product of tph-1 (has_output); the same molecule then directly activates mod-1 (relay).

molecules.label: Oct (octopamine)
molecules.directness_note: Octopamine is produced by tbh-1 (RIC) and is the direct ligand of the SER-6 octopamine receptor in AWB — direct receptor agonist (RO:0012001).

molecules.label: Oct (octopamine)
molecules.directness_note: Octopamine is the enzymatic product of tbh-1 (has_output); same molecule then directly activates ser-6 (relay).

molecules.label: endocrine signal (secreted molecule near URX)
molecules.directness_note: Unidentified secreted endocrine signal from URX to intestine (dashed arrow; black-dot vesicle clusters). Identity unknown — model as causal flow from URX to the intestinal nhr-76 step, not as a named direct activator. Flag as uncertain.
